## Plugin or Framework Change?

- [ ] New plugin (e.g. Axbus.Plugin.Reader.Xml)
- [ ] Existing plugin enhancement
- [ ] Client application change (ConsoleApp / WinFormsApp)
- [ ] Configuration change
- [ ] Documentation
